name: HALLIBURTON CO
summary: Halliburton Company is one of the world's largest providers of products and services to the energy industry, operating through two segments: Completion and Production, and Drilling and Evaluation. Founded in 1919, the company offers cementing, stimulation, hydraulic fracturing, artificial lift, drilling fluids, directional drilling, wireline logging, and digital/AI solutions to major, national, and independent oil and gas producers in more than 70 countries.

products.name: Artificial Lift
products.description: Maximizes reservoir and wellbore recovery using lifting technology and intelligent field management, including electrical submersible pumps.

products.name: Cementing
products.description: Bonds wells and well casing while isolating fluid zones and maximizing wellbore stability; also provides casing equipment.

products.name: Completion Tools
products.description: Downhole solutions including liner hanger systems, sand control, multilateral systems, and intelligent well completions.

products.name: Multi-Chem
products.description: Customized specialty chemicals and services for completion, production, midstream, and downstream to optimize flow assurance and integrity.

products.name: Pipeline & Process Services
products.description: Pre-commissioning, commissioning, maintenance, and decommissioning services for onshore and offshore pipelines and process plants.

products.name: Production Enhancement
products.description: Stimulation and sand control services including hydraulic fracturing, acidizing, and fluids for unconsolidated reservoirs.

products.name: Production Solutions
products.description: Well intervention solutions including coiled tubing, hydraulic workover units, downhole tools, pumping, and nitrogen services.

products.name: Baroid
products.description: Drilling fluid systems, completion fluids, solids control, specialized testing equipment, and waste management for drilling operations.

products.name: Drill Bits and Services
products.description: Roller cone bits, fixed cutter bits, hole enlargement tools, and coring equipment for drilling wells.

products.name: Halliburton Project Management
products.description: Integrated solutions leveraging well construction, completion, and intervention services including project and asset management.

products.name: Landmark Software and Services
products.description: Cloud-based digital services and AI solutions for subsurface insights, integrated well construction, and reservoir and production management.

products.name: Sperry Drilling
products.description: Directional and horizontal drilling, measurement-while-drilling, logging-while-drilling, and rig site information systems.

products.name: Testing and Subsea
products.description: Dynamic reservoir information acquisition, well testing, fluid sampling, subsea safety systems, and managed pressure drilling solutions.

products.name: Wireline and Perforating
products.description: Open-hole logging, cased-hole and slickline services, perforating, pipe recovery, and well intervention services.

products.name: Zeus IQ Electric Fracturing Platform
products.description: Electric fracturing platform used in North America; 50% of North American fracturing fleet transitioned to Zeus electric pumps as of 2025.

products.name: iCruise Rotary Steerable Systems
products.description: Rotary steerable drilling system utilized to maximize value in North America operations.

products.name: LOGIX Automation
products.description: Automation technology deployed for drilling and well construction efficiency in North America.

partnerships.description: Strategic collaboration around behind-the-meter power generation, highlighted as a 2026 focus area.
